executives.name: Bruce Scott
executives.background: Mr. Scott is a lawyer with over 30 years of experience in corporate and securities law. He has served as General Counsel for Seabridge since 2011.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Carol Willson
executives.background: Ms. Willson is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 35 years of experience in audit and risk management.

executives.name: Clem Pelletier
executives.background: Mr. Pelletier is a process metallurgist with over 50 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environmental and permitting issues.

executives.name: Eliseo Gonzalez-Urien
executives.background: Mr. Gonzalez-Urien is a geologist with over 50 years of experience. He was formerly the President of Placer Dome Exploration.

executives.name: Melanie Miller
executives.background: Ms. Miller has over 25 years of experience in the mining and financial sectors. She is currently an independent consultant.

executives.name: William Threlkeld
executives.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in mineral exploration. He has been with Seabridge since 2000 and is responsible for the design and execution of the company's exploration programs.

executives.name: Chris Reynolds
executives.background: Mr. Reynolds has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He joined Seabridge in 2007 and has served as Vice President, Finance and Chief Financial Officer since that time.

executives.name: Rudi Fronk
executives.background: Mr. Fronk is a co-founder of Seabridge and has over 35 years of experience in the gold business, primarily as a senior executive in corporate development, bankable feasibility studies, and finance. Prior to Seabridge, he held senior positions with Greenstone Resources, Kirkwood Resources, and Amax Gold.

board_of_directors.name: John Sabine
